title: Child Poverty Strategy: Monitoring and Evaluation Framework
body: "This Framework outlines how the UK Government will monitor and evaluate the Child Poverty Strategy. The aim of the Framework is to ensure the Strategy is on track to reduce child poverty, learn what works and continue to make the best case for continued and further intervention.  The Monitoring and Evaluation Framework builds on the successful and collaborative approach taken to Strategy development, and makes a commitment to transparency, accountability and continued learning. "
